description: Run your Substack growth loop from the command line — publish, schedule, engage, and measure with cross-table joins no single Substack API call can.

novel_features.name: Note-to-subscriber attribution ledger
novel_features.description: Connect every Note you posted to the paid and free subscribers that actually arrived in the 24-hour window after, so you stop guessing which content drove growth.

novel_features.name: Engagement reciprocity ledger
novel_features.description: See net-give/net-take per writer you engage with — who reciprocates your restacks/comments, who quietly free-rides on yours.

novel_features.name: Cadence guard
novel_features.description: Refuse to fire (or queue) a Note that lands less than 30 minutes after your last own-Note or violates your time-of-day rotation. Returns typed exit 2 with a JSON diagnosis.

novel_features.name: Goal-aware best-time recommender
novel_features.description: Top day-of-week × hour cells ranked for whichever growth signal you pick (paid subs, likes, restacks, or comments) — not a single average.

novel_features.name: Hook-pattern miner
novel_features.description: Mechanically extracts which hook patterns (curiosity-gap colon, 3-sentence formula, em-dash reframe, question opener) actually rank in a niche, with restack/comment ratios.

novel_features.name: Swap-partner finder
novel_features.description: Score candidate publications for a Substack Recommendations swap by mutual-overlap density across followee + recommendation graphs.

novel_features.name: Pod restack scoreboard
novel_features.description: Given a list of handles, render a member × member engagement matrix — last 30 days of restacks/comments/likes between every pair.

novel_features.name: Voice fingerprint
novel_features.description: Measurable voice profile — sentence length, em-dash rate, colon-hook rate, hook-line ratios, vocabulary uniqueness — for any handle, with --diff to compare against another writer.

novel_features.name: Portfolio Dashboard
novel_features.description: One-screen status of every publication you own: subscriber count, paid count, last-published-at, drafts pending, next scheduled. No tab-switching, no CSV exports.

novel_features.name: Cross-Publication Twin
novel_features.description: Duplicate a published post into another publication you own as a draft. Preserves paywall markers, sections, and re-uploads images to the target publication's CDN.

novel_features.name: Subscriber Churn Diff
novel_features.description: Diff two SQLite snapshots of your subscriber list: who newly subscribed, who unsubscribed, who upgraded free->paid, who downgraded paid->free, since a chosen window.

novel_features.name: Cross-Sell Candidates
novel_features.description: SQL join across your publications' subscriber lists: emails paid on one publication but free or absent on the others, sorted by paid-publication coverage. The cross-sell list Substack does not ship.

novel_features.name: Best Posts Cross-Publication
novel_features.description: Rank posts by views, likes, comments, or restacks within a window. Optionally aggregate across every publication you own to find your overall top performer.

novel_features.name: Bilingual Pair Tracker
novel_features.description: Record EN<->DE post pairings in a local table. 'posts pair <en> <de>' adds; 'posts pairs --missing' lists posts in one language with no recorded twin in the other.

novel_features.name: Full-Text Grep
novel_features.description: FTS5 over post bodies + Notes + comments, ranked by bm25, returning snippets and source URLs. Optional scope (posts/notes/comments/all), publication, and since filter.

novel_features.name: Schedule Board
novel_features.description: ASCII calendar of the next 30 days showing scheduled posts across every publication you own. Multi-pub editorial overview in one screen.
